scripts.build: python3 scripts/generate_dashboard_ops_snapshot.py && python3 scripts/generate_spy_trends.py --out spy_trends.json && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html home.html privacy.html terms.html support.html studio.html feedback-dashboard.html rss-dashboard.html rss-viewer.html topic-badges-preview.html feed.json breaking_feed.json candidates.json rss_sources.json breaking_sources.json dashboard_ops_snapshot.json spy_trends.json spy_web_targets.json supabase-config.js sw.js manifest.webmanifest icon-192.png icon-512.png favicon-32.png favicon.ico _redirects _headers .nojekyll dist/ && mkdir -p dist/privacy dist/terms dist/support && cp privacy.html dist/privacy/index.html && cp terms.html dist/terms/index.html && cp support.html dist/support/index.html && cp -R assets dist/ && python3 scripts/generate_share_pages.py --feed feed.json --out dist && python3 scripts/prepare_domain_routes.py
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name poanta-demo
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name poanta-demo --branch preview
